titleStmt.title: SII 9.168: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 168. (A.R. No. 96 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP TO THE SOUTH OF THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 28, Subhānu, Pushya, ba. 10, Śukravāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti, Vyatīpāta corresponding to A.D. 1103 December 25 Friday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva whose Daṇḍanāyaka, Muddarasa, is said to have made a gift of the toll-revenue on two loads of betle leaves per year for the service of the god Kalidēva, after washing the feet of Śivaśakti-Paṇḍita, in the presence of the Mahājanas of Bāḷguḷi. Out of the 12 paṇas thus granted 2 paṇas were given to the reader of the Purāṇas.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja
paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarā
jyamuttarābhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samastarājya
bharanirūpitamahāmātyapadavīvirājamā
namānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasaṁpannaṁ nuḍidu
mattannanāśritajanakalpavṛkṣaṁ patikāryya
dakṣa(ṁ)nniyōgayōgandharāyaṇaṁ nītiparāyaṇaṁ
gōtrapavitraṁ sujanajanamitraṁ nāmādisamastapra
śastisahitaṁ śrīmadaccupannāyadadiṣṭhāyakaṁ daṇḍa
nāyakaṁ muddarasaru svasti śrī
maccāḷukyavikramavariṣa 28 neya subhānu
saṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa 10 śukravāradaṁdutta
rāyaṇasaṁkrā(ṁ)nti vyatīpātaṁ kūḍalu © svasti yama
niyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānu
ṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmatu
hariścaṁdradattiyagrahāraṁ bāḷguḷiyū
rūḍeyapramukhamahājanamayvadiṁba
ra sa(ṁ)nnidhānadōḷ svasti yamaniyamāsanānuṣṭhā
ṇaparāyaṇajapasamādhisakaḷāgamaśāstrapa
ramatatvajñānasakaḷaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmatsiva
śaktipaṇḍitara kālaṁ karccidhārāpūrbba
kaṁ māḍi śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvasvāmidēvara
nivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ tiṁgaḷiṁge yeraḍele
ya pēṟina suṁkaṁ panneraḍu paṇavaṁ biṭṭanī dharmmamana
yvadiṁbaruṁ pratipāḷisuvar © mattamā puṇyati
thiyōḷ Arasiyakeṟeya nākarasanuṁ maddūra bādiseṭṭi
yuṁ hānuṁgalla kosagiseṭṭiyuṁ hammakka bammiseṭṭiyuṁ taḷa
da gātrada seṭṭigaḷumiḻdayvadiṁbara sannidhānadoḷ śrīsva
yaṁbhukalidēvasvāmiyagrāsanada brāhma
ṇara satrakke yeleya pēṟiṁgeyoṁdu vīsaṁ talevoṟegeya
revīsamaṁ biṭṭarī dharmmamanayvadiṁbaruṁ pratipāḷisuvar
© svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasa
haśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . sāmānyō
yaṁ dharmmasētu(ṁ)rnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bha
vadbhiḥ . sarbbānētāṁ bhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhū
yō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . Ā panneraḍu paṇa
vinoḷage dēvara pūjārige paṇa 2 matta purāṇakke biṭṭa pa 1
pūvina tōṭakke paṇa 2 Antu gadyā 1 pa 4 ©
Digital edition of SII 9.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
